hero.title: Create & Deploy AI Agents in Minutes, Not Weeks

features.title: Everything you need to convert visitors into customers
features.subtitle: GenSmart combines the power of AI with the channels your customers already use.

multiChannel.title: Multi-Channel Deployment
multiChannel.description: Deploy to WhatsApp Business and web simultaneously. Meet your customers where they already are.

leadCapture.title: Intelligent Lead Capture
leadCapture.description: AI automatically captures and qualifies leads through natural conversation. No forms, no friction.

ragKnowledge.description: Upload documents and URLs. Your agent answers questions with accurate, context-aware responses.

humanTakeover.title: Human Takeover
humanTakeover.description: Seamlessly transfer conversations to human agents when needed. Stay in control at all times.

appointments.description: Let your AI agent book appointments directly in your calendar. No back-and-forth emails.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes

step1.title: Create your agent

step3.title: Capture leads automatically
step3.description: Your agent qualifies prospects, captures contact info, and books appointments — 24/7.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow

faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q2: What happens when I reach my message limit?
faq.a2: Your agents will stop responding until the next billing cycle, or you can purchase additional message packs.
faq.a3: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans.
faq.q4: Can I use my own OpenAI or Anthropic API key?
faq.a4: Yes! Enterprise plan users can bring their own API keys to remove all message limits.
